name: codex-session-logging
description: Capture complete Codex parent and subagent sessions into user-owned Supabase history.

interface.shortDescription: Capture complete parent and subagent session history.
interface.longDescription: Codex Session Logging uses lifecycle hooks to incrementally publish exact parent and subagent rollout bytes into a private Supabase Storage bucket with an idempotent Postgres catalog. Historical transcript backfills are disabled.
defaultPrompt: Capture complete Codex parent and subagent sessions
Drain queued Codex session logs to Supabase
